response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio in the first 30 seconds phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Oki ni Mesu Mama' provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics (00:00-00:30). For the dialogue-driven skit (00:30-04:59), manual transcription and translation were performed as no reference text was provided. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal activation. Rapid-fire dialogue utilizes instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') and aggressive truncation to prevent cascading delays. Prominent visual text cards (titles and locations) are subtitled during their appearance to ensure contextual clarity.
